notes:
qua lại = to go back and forth between places, or to visit/see each other regularly. It can also mean to have contact or dealings with someone.

Used for physical movement (between two locations) or social interaction (between people).  

It often suggests repeated action, not just one trip. Similar idea: đi lại (more about movement), but qua lại often highlights connection or interaction.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He usually goes back and forth between home and the company every day.
We go back and forth to visit our grandparents on weekends.
Classmates go back and forth to exchange homework with each other.

content.sentence: Chúng ta có thể ___ giữa hai thành phố.

translation.en: We can go back and forth between the two cities.
We can go back and forth between the two cities.

content.sentence: Chúng ta có thể ___ giữa hai thành phố.

notes_md:
**qua lại** = to go back and forth between places, or to visit/see each other regularly. It can also mean to have contact or dealings with someone.

Used for physical movement (between two locations) or social interaction (between people).  


It often suggests repeated action, not just one trip. Similar idea: **đi lại** (more about movement), but **qua lại** often highlights connection or interaction.
exampleSentences: Anh thường qua lại giữa nhà và công ty mỗi ngày.
Chị em mình hay qua lại thăm ông bà vào cuối tuần.
Bạn bè trong lớp thường qua lại để trao đổi bài tập với nhau.

definitions.en: To go back and forth; to alternate.
definitions.es: Ir de un lado a otro; alternar.

example.en: We need to travel back and forth between these two cities.
example.es: Necesitamos viajar de un lado a otro entre estas dos ciudades.
example.vi: Chúng ta cần qua lại giữa hai thành phố này.
